Name: departments_aggregate
SQL: WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "departments") SELECT json_object('aggregate', (SELECT json_object('count', COUNT(*), 'sum', json_object('budget', SUM("budget")), 'avg', json_object('budget', AVG("budget")), 'max', json_object('budget', MAX("budget")), 'min', json_object('budget', MIN("budget")), 'stddev', json_object('budget', STDDEV("budget")), 'stddev_pop', json_object('budget', STDDEV_POP("budget")), 'stddev_samp', json_object('budget', STDDEV_SAMP("budget")), 'variance', json_object('budget', VARIANCE("budget")), 'var_pop', json_object('budget', VAR_POP("budget")), 'var_samp', json_object('budget', VAR_SAMP("budget"))) FROM "_root.base")) AS "departments_aggregate"
